project.name: NEXUS MIND
project.description: NEXUS MIND is the first AI agent identity NFT collection formed through HACD Stack. Each token is a unique, PoW-anchored trading agent soul — named by its HACD inscription, typed by archetype, and formed permanently on-chain.

asset.utility_summary: Each NEXUS MIND NFT is a unique AI trading agent identity formed on one HACD diamond. It carries a permanent on-chain formation record, a trading personality archetype (Momentum / Contrarian / Arbitrageur / Sentinel), and a PoW-backed provenance that cannot be replicated or inflated.

copy.headline: AI agent identity, formed through PoW.
copy.subheadline: NEXUS MIND issues 256 unique AI trading agent NFTs — each one anchored to a real HACD diamond, named by its inscription, and formed permanently on-chain.
copy.short_description: 256 NEXUS MIND agent identities. 256 HACD lots. 1 NFT per HACD. Four archetypes: Momentum, Contrarian, Arbitrageur, Sentinel. No inflation. No duplicates. Formed on-chain through HACD Stack.
copy.risk_disclosure: NEXUS MIND NFTs are Stack Assets formed through the HACD protocol, not investment products. No price, liquidity, listing, trading return, or AI performance outcome is guaranteed. Formation cost is non-refundable. Future utility features are planned and not yet live. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review and issuer confirmation.

notes: stack_cost_hac_per_hacd must be confirmed with HACD Labs before Launchpad publication.
max_hacd_per_participant (currently 4) must be confirmed by issuer.
Archetype assignment logic (by HACD inscription sequence) must be finalized before launch.
removal_effect set to burn — issuer must confirm this is intentional.
All utility references are planned only — must not be presented as live at launch.
Draft generated using HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill.
